title: Assistant to the Manager
description: Promoted from the Risk and Asset Management internship to directly support the manager, with a growing focus on local market reinsurance operations.
responsibilities: Analyze and coordinate local market reinsurance placements and renewals
Support the manager in underwriting decisions and risk evaluation
Maintain and update records of the reinsurance portfolio
Submit required reports to the NAPP of Uzbekistan and liaise with local insurance companies

title: Intern, Risk and Asset Management Department
description: Supported underwriting and reinsurance operations for a railway insurance company.
responsibilities: Analyzed offered risks and discussed them with the lead underwriter to support final underwriting decisions
Assisted with reinsurance operations and maintained records of the reinsurance portfolio
Updated the company platform with newly accepted risks and submitted required reports to the NAPP of Uzbekistan
Maintained communication and coordinated with local insurance companies regarding reinsurance matters

title: Academic Support Teacher
description: Provided individualized and group instruction in SAT Math and English to help students improve scores.
responsibilities: Designed lesson plans, exercises, and practice tests aligned with the SAT format and standards
Identified student weaknesses and implemented targeted improvement strategies

title: Assistant Retail Merchandiser
description: Handled goods intake, quality checks, and inventory documentation for a retail operation.
responsibilities: Received goods, checked their quality, and registered products into the system
Provided training for newcomers on using the application
Assisted colleagues from other sections when needed
Documented deliveries, refunds, and write-offs of expired products
